profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk engages in raw materials, franchise, and food and beverage businesses in indonesia. It operates Kebab Turki Baba Raffi, Coutainer Kebab, Smokey Kebab, Sueger, Kebab Kitchen, Baba Rafi Cafe, Whole Chicken, Jellyta, Raffi Express, and Ayam Pul brands. PT Sari Kreasi Boga Tbk was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
